chapter_title.ar: باب فِي أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ صَلَوَاتُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِمْ فِي الْعِلْمِ وَ الشَّجَاعَةِ وَ الطَّاعَةِ سَوَاءٌ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 58 – The Imams<sup>asws</sup> are equal regarding the knowledge, and the bravery, and the (Obligated) obedience

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (177/ 3)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (177/ 3)

parts.text: عَلِيُّ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ

text: قَالَ لِي نَحْنُ فِي الْعِلْمِ وَ الشَّجَاعَةِ سَوَاءٌ وَ فِي الْعَطَايَا عَلَى قَدْرِ مَا نُؤْمَرُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad Bin Abdullah, from his father, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Dawood Al Nahdy,

(It has been narrated) from Ali son of Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, from Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘He<sup>asws</sup> said to me: ‘We (Imams<sup>asws</sup>) are equal in the knowledge and the bravery, and with regards to the Grants, it is in accordance with what we<sup>asws</sup> are Commanded (by Allah<sup>azwj</sup>)’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Abdallah has narrated from his father from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Dawud al-Nahdi from Al,i ibn Ja‘far who has narrated the following from abu al-Hassan. “In knowledge and courage we all are equal. In benefaction and grants we do to the degree we are commanded.”
